response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with ~15+ years of hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling). However, the role targets a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and engineering leadership at scale — none of which are evidenced in the resume. AI experience is recent and limited to tooling contributions rather than shipped AI products, and there is no track record of advising strategic customers, shaping cloud/AI product direction, or leading at a principal/director scope.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering depth (TS/Node, DLang, C/C++, mobile, embedded, GIS)
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, OSS founder
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Career trajectory is senior IC, not principal/director-level technical leadership
No evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority mismatch vs. Director-level Principal scope
Solid full-stack engineering breadth and craftsmanship
